# MiCA Register
Canonical: https://www.micaregister.com
Last-Updated: 2026-03-01
Language: en

Purpose: Public search interface for ESMA MiCA registers.

Coverage:
- CASP
- OTHER
- ART
- EMT
- NCASP

Important URLs:
- https://www.micaregister.com/sitemap.xml
- https://www.micaregister.com/robots.txt
- https://www.micaregister.com/casp
- https://www.micaregister.com/other
- https://www.micaregister.com/art
- https://www.micaregister.com/emt
- https://www.micaregister.com/ncasp

Entity URL pattern:
- https://www.micaregister.com/{register}/{id}

API docs:
- https://api.micaregister.com/docs
- https://mica-register-production.up.railway.app/docs

Data source:
- ESMA MiCA register publications.

Notes:
- Code license: MIT.
- Data reuse is subject to source terms.

Contact:
- mailto:kamil.marek.moson@gmail.com
